sections.title: What is expense tracking?
sections.body: Expense tracking is the practice of recording every cost your business incurs, with its category, date, tax and supporting receipt. Done well, it tells you exactly where money goes, what profit you really make, and how much input tax you can reclaim. Done poorly, profit becomes a guess and tax season becomes a scramble. Paper & Pen makes it a few seconds per expense.

sections.title: Capture, categorise, reclaim
sections.body: Paper & Pen turns scattered receipts into clean, categorised records that feed straight into your accounts.
items: Record an expense with its category, supplier and tax
Attach the receipt photo or PDF for the audit trail
Reclaim input VAT or GST where applicable
Set recurring expenses to record automatically
See spend by category and real profit in your reports

sections.title: Profit you can trust
sections.body: You cannot manage what you do not measure. When every expense is captured against income, your profit and loss is accurate, your VAT return is correct, and you can see which costs are creeping up before they hurt. Expenses in Paper & Pen feed the same ledger as your sales, so the whole picture stays consistent and reconciled.

faqs.a: Yes. Recording, categorising and attaching receipts to expenses is free forever on Paper & Pen.

faqs.q: Can I attach a receipt to an expense?
faqs.a: Yes. Snap or upload the receipt and it stays with the expense, giving you a clean audit trail.

faqs.q: Can I reclaim VAT on expenses?
faqs.a: Yes. Record input VAT or GST on each expense so your tax return reflects exactly what you can reclaim.

faqs.q: Can I track expenses in different currencies?
faqs.a: Yes. Record spend in any currency, including USD, EUR, AED, SAR and OMR, with correct decimals.
Yes. Set rent, subscriptions and utilities to record automatically each cycle so nothing is missed.
